config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the majority or the state. In my view, individual rights are the foundation that keeps society fair and prevents power from being concentrated too much. Society matters a lot, but it should be built by protecting people, not by overriding them too quickly.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika Serikat, itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan oleh mayoritas atau pemerintah. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu pagar yang membuat masyarakat tetap adil dan mencegah kekuasaan menekan orang yang lemah atau tidak populer. Tentu ada situasi tertentu, seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan umum, ketika pembatasan sementara bisa dibenarkan, tetapi harus sangat sempit, transparan, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” hanya jadi slogan yang menelan kebebasan pribadi.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the claim that society should routinely take priority over the individual, because in Indonesia that kind of language can too easily be used to silence dissent and excuse arbitrary power. At the same time, I also do not believe individual rights are absolute in every situation; during public health emergencies or serious security threats, some limits can be justified if they are narrow and accountable. The real problem is when “society” is treated as a blank check for the state or the majority, instead of something that must earn legitimacy by respecting people first. For me, a healthy society in Indonesia is one where rights are the baseline, not the obstacle.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya hak individu harus menjadi titik awal, bukan sesuatu yang mudah dikalahkan oleh klaim “kepentingan masyarakat.” Dari pengalaman dan nilai yang umum di Amerika Serikat, saya melihat betapa cepatnya alasan demi kebaikan bersama bisa dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan mayoritas atau perluasan kuasa pemerintah. Namun, saya juga tidak menganggap hak individu itu mutlak tanpa batas; dalam keadaan darurat seperti kesehatan publik, pembatasan bisa sah jika benar-benar sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling sering mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi kebebasan sambil tetap menjaga keselamatan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should routinely take priority over the rights of the individual, because in Indonesia that idea can too easily be used to justify censorship, pressure to conform, or abuse by authorities. I understand the argument for the common good, especially in emergencies like public health or security, but those limits must be narrow, temporary, and accountable rather than treated as a default rule. From my perspective, society is strongest when it protects individual rights first, because that is what keeps power from becoming arbitrary and keeps the majority from crushing unpopular people. If “society” is used as a vague excuse to override rights, then it stops serving the public and starts serving those in power.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh dijadikan alasan default untuk mengalahkan hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika Serikat, pengalaman politik di sini menunjukkan bahwa alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” sering sekali dipakai untuk memperluas kuasa pemerintah atau menekan kelompok yang tidak populer. Tetapi saya juga tidak setuju jika hak individu diperlakukan absolut tanpa pengecualian; dalam keadaan darurat seperti wabah atau ancaman keamanan nyata, pembatasan bisa sah kalau benar-benar sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat. Buat saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin membatasi kekuasaan saat mengklaim berbicara atas nama semua orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
